cit.basis: Corporate income tax under the Income Tax Ordinance 2001, tax year 2025 (TY2025): 29% standard company rate.

small_company_conditions.note: Small company (s.2(59A)): paid-up capital plus undistributed reserves <= PKR 50m, employees <= 250, annual turnover <= PKR 250m.

super_tax.note: Progressive super tax (s.4C) of 0-10% on high incomes; top 10% for income above PKR 500m (banking companies face higher super tax). Not modelled in this SME estimator.

cit.note: Administered by the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR). Minimum tax on turnover, alternative corporate tax, and final-tax regimes are out of scope.

wht.note: Pakistan operates a withholding-tax (WHT) heavy regime: extensive withholding on supplies, services, contracts, imports, dividends, and profit on debt, often as minimum or final tax. Rates vary widely by transaction and filer status; not modelled.

gst.basis: Sales tax on goods (GST) at the federal level under the Sales Tax Act 1990: 18% standard rate.
gst.provincial_services_note: Sales tax on services is a provincial levy (Punjab, Sindh, KPK, Balochistan, ICT), typically 13-16% depending on province and service.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year (TY2025); Pakistan's tax year and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Super tax (s.4C), minimum tax on turnover, alternative corporate tax, WHT/final-tax regimes, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
